title: Cyclophorus sphaerostichus
taxonomy: Cyclophorus sphaerostichus is a species of air-breathing land snail, a terrestrial pulmonate gastropod mollusk. It belongs to the family Cyclophoridae, which is a family of small to large-sized air-breathing land snails. The classification of Cyclophorus sphaerostichus also places it within the order Stylommatophora, which contains most land snails. This order is further grouped under the class Gastropoda, which comprises snails and slugs. The kingdom and phylum classifications of Cyclophorus sphaerostichus are also Animalia and Mollusca, respectively.
